name: Sea of Survivors
short_description: In Sea of Survivors, you can sail your ship in any direction but you can never stop moving. Evade and destroy hordes of pirates and sea monsters to gain experience, level up and choose upgrades for your ship. Explore oceans filled with mysterious curses, unlock treasures and fight for survival.
detailed_description:
Fight hordes of swashbucklers and sea monsters. Explore oceans scattered with treacherous islands, lost treasures and mysterious curses. Combine powerful relics and upgrades to become more powerful and test yourself against fierce enemies, epic bosses and the sea itself.

Features:

  • Sail a ship that can never stop moving, navigate and explore an open world with distinct biomes and factions

  • Destroy thousands of pirates, sea monsters and outlast horrors of the deep during action packed 20 minute runs

  • Discover lost islands, raid them for their treasure and face off against the foes that protect them

  • Rescue unique crew members with randomized traits and recruit them to help you on your journey

  • Find powerful treasures and relics. Combine them and discover different synergies with every run. 

  • Collect doubloons from fallen enemies and use them to upgrade your ship permanently 

  • Complete bounties to unlock achievements and more content

  • Conquer 20 tiers of Infamy, each one making the game harder, the enemies tougher, and your name louder

  • Generate new oceans to explore, creating new routing challenges for your voyages

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, German
